text.tspan: u2022 1 memtable check + 1 lookup per level
u2022 Bloom filters eliminate most disk hits
u2022 Block cache reduces I/O on hot data
u2022 But: still slower than B-tree for random point reads
(which is why LSM trades read speed for write speed)

g.text: 2. Check each L0 SSTable (recent, may overlap)
3. Check L1 (sorted, non-overlapping u2014 only 1 SST to check)
Important: must check shallower levels first!

text.tspan: definitely NOT u2192 skip this SSTable
find SST containing key range with 42
read block from disk (1 random I/O)
